message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Search for Products by ID (using DB dao)

actor User

participant "«main»\nAdministration" as Administration
participant "«frame»\nMainMenu" as MainMenu
participant "«dialog»\nProductReportDialog" as PRD
participant "«ProductDAO»\nProductDatabaseDAO" as DAO
participant "SimpleListModel\n:model" as Model
database Database

Administration -> MainMenu : «construct»
User -> MainMenu : clicks 'View Products'
MainMenu -> PRD : «construct»
PRD -> DAO : «construct»

PRD -> DAO : getProducts()
activate DAO
DAO -> Database : select * from product
activate Database
Database --> DAO : ResultSet
deactivate Database
DAO -> DAO : reconstruct products\nfrom ResultSet
DAO --> PRD : products
deactivate DAO

PRD -> Model : «construct»
PRD -> Model : updateItems(products)
PRD -> PRD : lstProducts.setModel(model)

note left of PRD
products now
visible to user
end note

User -> PRD : enters product id into search bar
PRD -> PRD : txtId.getText : id
User -> PRD : clicks "Search"

PRD -> DAO : search(id)
activate DAO
DAO -> Database : select * from product where product_id = id
activate Database
Database --> DAO : product
deactivate Database
DAO --> PRD : product
deactivate DAO

PRD -> Model : updateItems(product)
PRD -> PRD : lstProducts.getModel(model)

note left of PRD
only searched product
now visible to user
end note

@enduml
```
